item.title: Custom Combining – What Could Go Wrong?
item.description: Join the challenges of custom combining and see the surprises that come with working different fields. Fun, unpredictable, and full of lessons for farmers.

media:content.media:title: Custom Combining – What Could Go Wrong?
media:content.media:description: Join the challenges of custom combining and see the surprises that come with working different fields. Fun, unpredictable, and full of lessons for farmers.

item.title: Trading Planters vs Combines
item.description: See why trading planters can be nearly as challenging as handling combines. A behind-the-scenes look at the complexities of farm equipment swaps.

media:content.media:title: Trading Planters vs Combines
media:content.media:description: See why trading planters can be nearly as challenging as handling combines. A behind-the-scenes look at the complexities of farm equipment swaps.

item.title: The 2096 Is Ready to Work
item.description: Watch as the 2096 tractor is prepped and ready for the season. See it in action tackling farm tasks with power and efficiency.

media:content.media:title: The 2096 Is Ready to Work
media:content.media:description: Watch as the 2096 tractor is prepped and ready for the season. See it in action tackling farm tasks with power and efficiency.

item.title: That Plug Packs a Punch: Hydraulic Oil Spill
item.description: Watch as a stubborn plug causes a hydraulic oil spill, creating a messy situation and showing the importance of safety and proper handling on machinery.

media:content.media:title: That Plug Packs a Punch: Hydraulic Oil Spill
media:content.media:description: Watch as a stubborn plug causes a hydraulic oil spill, creating a messy situation and showing the importance of safety and proper handling on machinery.

item.title: This Problem Caused Big Trouble
item.description: A small issue escalates into a major problem, showing how it unfolded, the challenges faced, and the lessons learned from the situation.

media:content.media:title: This Problem Caused Big Trouble
media:content.media:description: A small issue escalates into a major problem, showing how it unfolded, the challenges faced, and the lessons learned from the situation.

item.title: Hauling Corn and Checking Weights
item.description: Join us as we haul corn from the field and check weights, demonstrating proper handling, measurement, and tips for an efficient harvest process.

media:content.media:title: Hauling Corn and Checking Weights
media:content.media:description: Join us as we haul corn from the field and check weights, demonstrating proper handling, measurement, and tips for an efficient harvest process.

item.title: The Aftermath of the Big Storm
item.description: See the impact of the big storm as we assess damage, cleanup, and recovery, highlighting the challenges and resilience in the wake of severe weather.

media:content.media:title: The Aftermath of the Big Storm
media:content.media:description: See the impact of the big storm as we assess damage, cleanup, and recovery, highlighting the challenges and resilience in the wake of severe weather.

item.title: Deere vs Case 4-Track Comparison
item.description: We share our insights comparing Deere and Case 4-track tractors, covering performance, handling, and features to help farmers make informed equipment choices.

media:content.media:title: Deere vs Case 4-Track Comparison
media:content.media:description: We share our insights comparing Deere and Case 4-track tractors, covering performance, handling, and features to help farmers make informed equipment choices.

item.title: Working the Black Dirt
item.description: Watch the process of working rich black soil on the farm, showcasing plowing, planting, and preparing the land for a productive growing season.

media:content.media:title: Working the Black Dirt
media:content.media:description: Watch the process of working rich black soil on the farm, showcasing plowing, planting, and preparing the land for a productive growing season.
